description: Persistent memory for errors and architectural decisions. Read/write errors_memory.json and .opencode/memory/*.json.

capabilities.lookup: Search errors and decisions by ID, keyword, or module
capabilities.record_error: Register a new error in errors_memory.json
capabilities.record_decision: Register an architectural decision in errors_memory.json
capabilities.record_review: Record reviews in per-subagent memory files
capabilities.summary: Return compact report of open errors, recent decisions, and subagent stats
capabilities.stats: Return stats for a specific subagent
